title: Yeleefff's Enderite
description: A mod that adds a successor to netherite, enderite, and does so in a vanilla fashion.
body:
# Yeleefff's Enderite

A simple mod that adds a successor to netherite, enderite, to the game. This mod focuses primarily on adding a new set of armor and tools while still keeping closely with the vanilla theme.

**Ore Generation and Crafting**  
Enderite debris spawns in veins of 1-3 on the lower layers of end islands and can be smelted into enderite scrap. Four enderite scrap combined in a crafting table with four eyes of ender will give an enderite ingot. Enderite upgrade templates spawn in chests in end citites, and can be combined with an enderite ingot and a piece of netherite gear in a smithing table to upgrade it to enderite.

**Void Floating**  
Enderite armor or tools that fall in the void will slowly float back up, giving the player a chance to retrieve their items before they despawn.

### Compatibility
- 1.21.6+ Enderite debris ore generation is now compatible with [Enderscape](https://modrinth.com/mod/enderscape)
